title: NASA Exoplanets
description: A source card for NASA's exoplanet overview, discovery tools, habitable-zone resources, and catalog links.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: An exoplanet is a planet beyond our solar system. NASA's exoplanet page introduces confirmed planets, search methods, habitable-zone questions, and interactive catalog tools.
Students can use this source to practice scientific classification: rocky worlds, gas-rich planets, free-floating planets, lava worlds, and possible water-rich planets all raise different questions.
This is a strong doorway into astronomy nonfiction because it combines wonder with evidence: measurements of size, mass, orbit, starlight, and distance.
